title: Invigorating Canadian Tofu Skillet
description: A salty and pillowy Canadian dish featuring marinated tofu, cooked in sunflower oil on a comal, perfect for a energizing meal, dairy-free-friendly.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together soy sauce, maple syrup, rice vinegar, garlic powder, onion powder, salt, and black pepper to make the marinade.
Add the cubed tofu to the marinade and toss to coat, letting it marinate for at least 30 minutes.
Heat the sunflower oil in a comal over medium-high heat.
Remove the tofu from the marinade, letting any excess liquid drip off.
Add the tofu to the comal and cook until golden brown on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Remove the tofu from the comal and set aside on a plate.
In the same comal, add the chopped scallions and cook until they start to soften, about 2 minutes.
Return the tofu to the comal and stir to combine with the scallions.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the tofu is fully coated with the scallion mixture.
